hooks.description: [consolidated 2026-06-13] PostToolUse/Bash checks in ONE process. post_merge_cleanup (post gh pr merge), pr_open_monitor_arm (arm Monitor after pr create/ready).
Clear pending monitor-arm sentinel when Monitor fires with pr_monitor.py <N> or gh pr <view|checks> <N>

[consolidated 2026-06-13] PreToolUse/Edit checks in ONE process (was 4 python spawns). maintenance_worker_dry_run_floor DELETED (advisory-only, false-fired on reads + the global non-Zeus ~/.claude/settings.json).

hooks.command: python3 .claude/hooks/dispatch.py --multi invariant_test secrets_scan pre_merge_contamination cotenant_staging_guard maintree_git_state_guard pre_checkout_uncommitted_overlap pr_create_loc_accumulation pre_merge_comment_check pr_thread_reply_waste pre_branch_create_in_primary monitor_arm_overdue_advisor
hooks.description: [consolidated 2026-06-13] PreToolUse/Bash checks in ONE process — was 12 python spawns/Bash (~655ms), now 1 (~55ms). BLOCKING (exit 2): maintree_git_state_guard (branch-mutating git in main tree; bypass MAINTREE_GIT_BYPASS=1), cotenant_staging_guard (broad git add in main worktree; bypass COTENANT_GUARD_BYPASS=1), pr_create_loc_accumulation (tiny PR; bypass ZEUS_PR_ALLOW_TINY=1), pre_merge_comment_check (unsafe gh pr merge; bypass ZEUS_PR_MERGE_FORCE=1). maintenance_worker_dry_run_floor DELETED (advisory-only noise).
Advisory: phase-class subagent returns with tracked uncommitted changes -> commit reminder

RULE 1 guard (operator 2026-06-14): block + redirect when the final message concludes 'no edge'/'market efficient' — no-edge is OUR defect; root-cause the suppression, find other approaches. Bypass ZEUS_NO_EDGE_GUARD_OFF=1.
[2026-06-13] Hook-registry integrity self-test, once per session (moved off per-call module import for perf; B-fix)
After WorktreeCreate, emit naming policy + scope + sentinel write advisory
Before WorktreeRemove, emit pre-remove dirty/uncommitted check + branch closure suggestion
